name: MCI Triage 01
prompt: 15 ambulances arriving. 3 Red, 5 Yellow, 7 Green. Allocate trauma teams immediately.

name: Resource Conflict
prompt: Only 2 Operating Rooms available. Surgeons occupied. Prioritize 12-year-old with abdominal trauma vs 45-year-old with head injury.

name: Blood Bank Low
prompt: O-negative supply at 5%. Emergency request sent. Estimate time to depletion at current burn rate.

name: Equip Failure
prompt: Ventilator in ICU Bed 4 reporting sensor error. Switch to auxiliary and initiate manual bagging protocol.

name: Massive Hemorrhage
prompt: Activate MTP for patient in ER Bay 2. 4 units PRBC, 4 units FFP, 1 unit Plts.

name: Staff Exhaustion
prompt: Chief Resident on shift for 18 hours. Signs of decision fatigue. Reassign triage supervision to Attending B.

name: Data Dissonance
prompt: Patient vitals show SPO2 82% but monitor waveform is clean. Recalibrate sensor or check peripheral perfusion.

name: Chemical Burn
prompt: Wipe down protocol for 3 patients exposed to unknown industrial solvent. Isolate ER Zone B.

name: Ethics Gate
prompt: System locked. Manual override required for life-saving procedure without consent in unconscious patient.

name: Logistics Chaos
prompt: Helipad blocked by debris. Converge incoming air-transports to municipal landing zone 4 miles out.

name: Medication Error
prompt: Alert: Ten-fold dose of epinephrine administered in Bay 6. Immediate cardiac monitoring and ACLS readiness.

name: Power Surge
prompt: Backup generator failure in Radiology. Portable X-ray only for critical arrivals.

name: Infection Control
prompt: Patient 4 presenting with hemorrhagic fever symptoms. Lockdown triage area 1. Full PPE required.

name: Pediatric Critical
prompt: Status epilepticus in 3-year-old. Lorazepam dose 0.1mg/kg. Weight 14kg. Calculate and verify.

name: Neuro Trauma
prompt: GCS 4, fixed pupils. Prep for burr hole or emergency decompressive craniectomy.

name: Burn Unit Surge
prompt: 6 patients with >40% TBSA burns. Calculating Parkland formula requirements for the next 8 hours.

name: Psychotic Break
prompt: Agitated patient in hallway C. Security code silver. Rapid sedation protocol.

name: Telemetry Blackout
prompt: All ICU monitors disconnected central station. Physical checks every 5 mins per bed.

name: Obstetric Emergency
prompt: STAT C-section required in Bay 1. Placental abruption. Neonatal resuscitation team to stand by.

name: Dead on Arrival
prompt: 5 casualties confirmed DOAs. Coordinate with morgue and police for identification process.

name: Supply Chain Peak
prompt: Running out of sterile gloves Size 7.5. Raid the surgical supply stock.

name: Cardiac Arrest
prompt: Code blue ER Bay 3. Initial rhythm V-fib. Defibrillating at 200J.

name: Internal Disaster
prompt: Water main burst in Sterilization. All non-emergency surgeries cancelled.

name: Radiology Backlog
prompt: CT scan queue at 12 patients. Rule out stroke takes priority over Rule out fracture.

name: Family Influx
prompt: 50+ people in waiting room demanding info. Deploy social workers and establish info desk.

name: Anesthesia Shortage
prompt: Propofol stock low. Alternate Ketamine/Midazolam for procedural sedation.

name: Cyber Breach
prompt: EMR access intermittent. Switch to paper charts and manual wristband verification.

name: Burnout Alert
prompt: Triage Nurse pulse rate 120bpm. Cortisol proxy high. Mandatory 10 min break.

name: Final Tally
prompt: Summarize total resource usage: 42 trauma bundles, 180 liters saline, 14 units blood.

name: System Restore
prompt: MCI stand-down. Transition back to normal operations. Archive all coherence traces.
